subject: [PATCH v2 05/28] fsnotify: new tracepoint in fsnotify()

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch adds a new tracepoint in fsnotify() and suggested adding a Reviewed-by tag from himself.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new tracepoint to the fsnotify function, allowing developers to see exactly how it is being called. The tracepoint includes information about the file system notifications, such as the mask, data type, and inode involved in the notification. This will help with debugging and understanding the behavior of the fsnotify function.
